name: HRQ_QUESTIONS_B
description: Contains definitions for Questions and how they are presented to participants.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a question.  System generated id.  This attribute combined with the version number and business group id forms the primary key.

columns.Name: QSTN_VERSION_NUM
columns.Comments: The version number of the question. This attribute combined with the question id and business group id forms the primary key.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: QUESTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a question.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the category id.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Identifies the status of the question.

columns.Name: QUESTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the type of the question.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the response type id.

columns.Name: MIN_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Identifies the minimum length of the response.

columns.Name: MAX_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Identifies the maximum length of the response.

columns.Name: MIN_SELECTIONS
columns.Comments: Identifies the minimum selection for the response.

columns.Name: MAX_SELECTIONS
columns.Comments: Identifies the maximum selection for the response.

columns.Name: OWNER
columns.Comments: Identifies the owner of the question.

columns.Name: PRIVACY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the questionnaire is Private or Public.  Private questionnaires can only be updated by the owner.

columns.Name: UPDATE_ALLOWED
columns.Comments: Identifies if updates are allowed to this question.

columns.Name: ADHOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies if this question is an adhoc question.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the subscriber id.

columns.Name: RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the rating model id.

columns.Name: LATEST_VERSION
columns.Comments: Identifies if this is the latest version of the question.

columns.Name: VERSION_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of changes made when a new version is created.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_ALLOWED
columns.Comments: Identifies if attachment is allowed as a response.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_DESC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the rating level description was altered by the user

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SCORED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates question is a scored question.

columns.Name: MIN_THRESHOLD_SCORE
columns.Comments: Mininum threshold score for the question.

columns.Name: MAX_THRESHOLD_SCORE
columns.Comments: Maximum threshold score for the question.

columns.Name: MAX_POSSIBLE_SCORE
columns.Comments: Maximum possible score for the question. Value should be within the range of Minimum Threshold and Maximum Threshold score.

columns.Name: CLASSIFICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Classify a question based on its code like Disqualification/ Preliminary.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code to identify the candidate as INTERNAL/ EXTERNAL/ BOTH.

columns.Name: ALL_LOCATIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the question will be considered for all locations or not.

columns.Name: ALL_ORGANIZATIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the question will be considered for all organizations or not.

columns.Name: ALL_JOB_FAMILIES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the question will be considered for all job families or not.

columns.Name: ALL_JOB_FUNCTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the question will be considered for all job functions or not.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: CONDITION_QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: CONDITION_QUESTION_ID

columns.Name: CONDITION_QSTN_VERSION_NUM
columns.Comments: CONDITION_QSTN_VERSION_NUM

columns.Name: CONDITION_ANSWER_ID
columns.Comments: CONDITION_ANSWER_ID

columns.Name: CONDITION_DISPLAY
columns.Comments: CONDITION_DISPLAY

columns.Name: QSTN_SAMPLE_SIZE
columns.Comments: Count of choices that will be selected randomly out of all choices for a question. The field will be active if question response order is 'R'.

columns.Name: QSTN_RESPONSE_ORDER
columns.Comments: This field can have a value of V/R/Null. Default value is 'V' and in this case all defined answer choices will be presented. Value of 'R' indicates that a random set of answer choice will be presented from the total choices and the count of choices presented will be based on the value defined as sample size

columns.Name: MIN_DATE
columns.Comments: Minimum value of date allowed for response of this question

columns.Name: MAX_DATE
columns.Comments: Maximum value of date allowed for response of this question

columns.Name: ENABLE_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This field is used to enable or disable additional comments for the Question.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: SURVEY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the survey type of the question.

columns.Name: ANALYSIS_GRAPH_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the Analysis Graph Type of the Question

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_ANALYSIS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies whether Sentiment Analysis is enabled for the Question.

columns.Name: SUMMARIZATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies whether Summarization is enabled for the Question.
